macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: CFTC clears Coinbase for global crypto perpetual futures
items.summary: Coinbase received CFTC approval to offer global crypto perpetual futures, making it the first U.S. exchange allowed into the offshore derivatives market. The same development also included CFTC authorization for Kalshi to launch American-born Bitcoin perpetual futures.

items.title: Bitcoin weakens in broader crypto selloff
items.summary: Bitcoin was reported around US$71,390.67, down 2.9% over 24 hours, while Ether slipped 0.4%, XRP fell 2.3%, and Solana declined 1.1%. Another market recap said Bitcoin traded near US$67,000, highlighting continued volatility and risk-off sentiment.

items.title: Binance expands into U.S. stock and ETF trading
items.summary: Binance launched U.S. stock and ETF trading directly on its platform, marking a notable move beyond crypto into traditional financial assets. The expansion reflects continued convergence between digital-asset platforms and mainstream brokerage services.

items.title: TON surges after rebrand plan to 'Gram'
items.summary: The Open Network said it plans to rename Toncoin back to Gram, the name used in its original whitepaper, and the token jumped more than 15% on the news. The move was the largest notable project-specific development in the results provided.

items.title: Robinhood adds BIO token to its platform
items.summary: Robinhood added the BIO token to its trading platform as part of its ongoing crypto-product expansion. The listing increased access for retail users and was highlighted among the day’s notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Asus unveils ROG Xbox Ally X handheld with OLED display and bundled AR glasses
items.summary: Asus reportedly introduced a new ROG Xbox Ally X handheld aimed at gaming portability, with an OLED display and bundled AR glasses. The announcement is one of the biggest hardware-related gaming stories in the latest roundup.

items.title: Final Fantasy XIV: Dawntrail Patch 7.51 launches today
items.summary: Square Enix’s latest Final Fantasy XIV update, Patch 7.51 for Dawntrail, went live with full patch notes. The update is among the most notable live-service game developments in the past day.

items.title: Path of Exile 2 expansion boosts game’s popularity in internet cafes
items.summary: A new Path of Exile 2 expansion reportedly pushed the game up to 15th in internet cafe rankings, showing a notable spike in player interest. This is one of the clearest esports-adjacent and live-service momentum stories in the past 24 hours.

items.title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 officially confirmed for Switch 2
items.summary: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 has been officially announced, with a Nintendo Switch 2 version included. The game also appears to be part of a broader rollout strategy that includes special edition rewards.

items.title: Nintendo Music adds CarPlay, Android Auto, and web player support
items.summary: Nintendo Music received a notable update, expanding access through CarPlay, Android Auto, and a web player. The update broadens Nintendo’s ecosystem beyond consoles and mobile devices.

items.title: Sony’s June State of Play is set to feature more than 60 minutes of announcements
items.summary: Sony has scheduled a new State of Play event and says it will run for more than an hour. Marvel’s Wolverine is the only confirmed featured title so far, with other reveals still unconfirmed.

items.title: Marathon’s first open play week starts June 2
items.summary: Bungie’s Marathon is opening its first public play week, giving players a chance to try the game ahead of release. Bungie also shared new details about what to expect in the game’s upcoming season.

items.title: Valve raises Steam Deck prices by as much as $300
items.summary: Valve has reportedly increased Steam Deck pricing significantly, with some models rising by up to $300. The move is one of the biggest hardware-business developments in gaming this week.

items.title: Atari acquires the maker of the Crossy Road games
items.summary: Atari has announced the acquisition of the studio behind the Crossy Road franchise. The deal adds another notable consolidation move to the gaming industry’s current wave of acquisitions.

items.title: PlayStation wireless fight stick and gaming monitor arrive in August
items.summary: Sony has revealed new gaming accessories, including a wireless fight stick and a gaming monitor slated for August. The announcement adds to the company’s hardware lineup ahead of its broader summer showcase season.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
